title: Four Cheese At Speed Tortelloni
summary: We've paired La Famiglia Rana Ricotta & Spinach Tortelloni – made using ingredients that are chopped, not blitzed – with an easy and delicious cheese sauce.

ingredients.label: 250g La Famiglia Rana Ricotta & Spinach Tortelloni
ingredients.name: Spinach and Ricotta Ravioli

method.description: Fill a large saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Season well with salt.

Grab a sauté pan and tip in the mascarpone with 4 tbsp of water. Set over a low heat to warm. Once melted, crumble in the gorgonzola and grate in 20g of the parmesan. Gently melt over a low heat, adding the zest of your lemon
Roughly chop the rocket. When the sauce is smooth and creamy, drop the tortelloni into the boiling water for 2 mins. Transfer to the sauce along with the rocket and toss to combine.
Divide between warm plates and grate over the remaining parmesan. Dig in.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
